history.reasoning: The node is in a critical state due to multiple severe performance degradations. Specifically, the Packet Loss (12% vs. < 2% threshold) and Failed Handovers (8/10 attempts vs. < 10% threshold) are significantly outside normal operating parameters. Furthermore, the measured Throughput (18 Mbps vs. ~300 Mbps expected) is extremely low, indicating a major service failure at this node. Although the RF Module Temperature is within limits, the link quality and operational failures necessitate immediate attention.
